subcodes.first_line: The glance of loving-kindness hath ever been directed towards thee, and the Ancient Pen doth bear witness unto that which hath been mentioned. Despair not [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ح س لازال طرف عنایت بانجناب بوده و قلم قدم شاهد و گواهست بر آنچه ذکر شد لاتیاس من
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @consolation and comfort
